blended.narrative: Timberline is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 20 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 4,088 ft. Looking ahead, 28 inches possible over the next 14 days.

Thursday: 5" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
